pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or generate code correctly on Java 17 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler release property to target Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 bytecode, which is incompatible with the target runtime environment and Spring Boot 3 requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not correctly handle Java 17 language features or module system requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch or execute tests on Java 17 due to internal API removals or module restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 integration test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Failsafe versions may fail to launch or execute integration tests on Java 17 due to internal API removals or module restrictions.
